posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title:
To hire an H-1B worker, companies must sign a federal form saying they can't find qualified Americans.

We pulled 15 years of filings. Analyzed the top 5.

314,100 times they said no Americans available.

99,000 times they fired Americans.

Signed under oath. Exposed by data.

quotedTweet.content:
Amazon: 30,000 Americans laid off. 12,000 H-1B visas approved. Same window.

Meta: 16,000 out. 5,000 visas in.

Microsoft: 3,426 out. 5,000 visas in.

AI is taking the jobs. And the ones AI doesn’t take, they’re offshoring.

This is accelerating rapidly before our eyes.
